scripts.test:console-backend: cd api && UV_CACHE_DIR="$(pwd)/.cache/uv" uv run python -m pytest ../tests/api/platform -q
scripts.test:audit:contract: cd api && UV_CACHE_DIR="$(pwd)/.cache/uv" uv run python ../tests/audit/public_model_contract_audit.py
scripts.test:live: cd api && UV_CACHE_DIR="$(pwd)/.cache/uv" uv run python ../tests/live/public_model_live_smoke.py
scripts.test:live:mixed: cd api && UV_CACHE_DIR="$(pwd)/.cache/uv" uv run python ../tests/live/provider_chain_mixed_smoke.py
scripts.test:live:journey: cd api && UV_CACHE_DIR="$(pwd)/.cache/uv" uv run python ../tests/live/release_user_journey_smoke.py
